reasoning: The historical trend analysis provided a combined probability estimate of 0.59 that the price will remain above $119 (the most recent close price). DDOG recently suffered a significant drop from $141 to $119 driven by tech sector rotation and profit-taking following some analyst price target cuts. Despite the downgrade, major analysts still maintain Buy/Overweight ratings with price targets between $180 and $195, suggesting the current $119 level may represent an oversold bounce opportunity. Although recent momentum is downward, weekly stock moves are highly noisy and mostly symmetric; hence my probabilities stay close to 0.5. To obey the rule that uncertainty increases with duration, the short-term forecast for Jan 25 takes a modest tilt towards the statistical baseline (0.55), while the longer-term horizon for Feb 17 reverts closer to maximum uncertainty (0.52).
